data.title: U.S. FHFA Director: Congress will accuse Powell of perjury
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The director of the Federal Housing Finance Agency (FHFA) said that according to very reliable congressional sources, one or more members of Congress may accuse Powell of perjury in the US$2.5 billion renovation of the Federal Reserve Building to the Department of Justice. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Congress May Accuse Powell of Perjury Over Federal Reserve Renovation
data.description: According to Odaily, the Director of the U.S. Federal Housing Finance Agency (FHFA) has indicated that reliable congressional sources suggest one or more members of Congress may accuse Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell of perjury. The allegations are related to the $2.5 billion renovation of the Federal Reserve building. The matter is expected to be referred to the Department of Justice for further investigation.

OSL Group (09618.HK) and JD.com (09618.HK) both rose by more than 4%, Alibaba (09988.HK) rose by more than 3%, ZhongAn Online (06060.HK) rose by nearly 3%, Huaxing Capital Holdings (01911.HK), Yaocai Securities (01428.HK), and China Merchants Securities (06099.HK) all rose by 1.5%. data.title: US prosecutors expect to conclude Tornado Cash co-founder Roman Storm case by July 25
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Prosecutors in the Southern District of New York continue to charge Tornado Cash co-founder and developer Roman Storm, and the trial is expected to last about a month. Assistant prosecutor Thane Rehn said the prosecution expects to finish its statement of charges against Storm by the end of next week, after which the Tornado Cash co-founder's lawyers will begin calling their own witnesses. Storm said he expects the trial to last "3-4 weeks" due to complex legal debates and unforeseen witnesses and evidence. Given that the prosecution is expected to close its statement by July 25, Storm's lawyers have revealed the defense strategy they will present in court. Before the trial began, Storm said he was unsure whether his legal team would let him testify in person to defend himself. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Cactus Custody, a compliant custodian under Matrixport, has reached a strategic cooperation with Batoshi Foundation
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Cactus Custody, a compliant digital asset custodian under the Matrixport Group, announced a strategic partnership with the Batoshi Foundation. Batoshi Foundation is an ecological supporter of the BTC native asset protocol TerpLayer and the issuer and operator of beraBTC. Through this cooperation, Cactus Custody will provide it with institutional-level secure custody services. The BTC used by users to mint beraBTC on Berachain will be safely kept by Cactus Custody through custody collaboration to ensure that the funds are verifiable, traceable, and redeemable.
It is reported that Cactus Custody has obtained SOC 1 Type 1 and SOC 2 Type 2 international certifications audited by Deloitte, and through multi-signature, hot and cold wallet separation and hardware security module (HSM) technology to ensure asset custody compliance and transparency, and meet institutional risk control needs. At present, Cactus Custody manages assets of more than US$1 billion, and its service objects cover industry participants such as mining companies, DeFi platforms and asset management institutions.

data.title: China Industrial Internet Research Institute holds a seminar on stablecoins and industrial digital assets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The China Industrial Internet Research Institute recently held a "Stablecoin and Industrial Digital Assets Seminar" to discuss core topics such as stablecoin policy supervision, industrial digital asset transformation, and the integrated development of RWA and the industrial Internet. Relevant comrades from the Information Technology Development Department of the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology attended the meeting for guidance. Representatives of financial experts from Guosen Securities Co., Ltd., SoftBank Asia Venture Capital, Fosun Fortune International Holdings Co., Ltd. and other financial companies attended the meeting. (Jinshi)

data.title: Stablecoin and Industrial Digital Assets Discussed at Recent Seminar in China
data.description:
According to Foresight News, a seminar on stablecoins and industrial digital assets was recently organized by the China Academy of Industrial Internet. The event focused on key topics such as stablecoin policy regulation, the transformation of industrial digital assets, and the integration of real-world assets (RWA) with industrial internet development.

The seminar was attended by representatives from the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology's Information Technology Development Department, who provided guidance during the discussions. Experts from various financial sectors, including Guosen Securities Co., Ltd., SoftBank Asia Venture Capital, and Fosun Wealth International Holdings, also participated in the event.

The discussions aimed to explore the regulatory landscape for stablecoins and the potential for digital assets to transform industrial sectors. The integration of RWAs with industrial internet technologies was highlighted as a significant area for future development, emphasizing the importance of collaboration between financial and industrial stakeholders.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed Thumzup board approves $250 million cryptocurrency purchase
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Thumzup Media Corporation (NASDAQ: TZUP) announced today that its board of directors has authorized the company to hold up to $250 million in cryptocurrency assets, covering the following currencies: Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Solana (SOL), Ripple (XRP), Dogecoin (DOGE), Litecoin (LTC) and stablecoin USDC. (PR Newswire) 
Previously reported, Trump's eldest son invested in Thumzup, a social media company that holds cryptocurrency reserves.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Waller Discusses Stablecoins and Economic Risks
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller stated that while stablecoins introduce competition to the payment system, they do not pose a threat. He mentioned that no one from the Trump administration has communicated with him regarding the position of Federal Reserve Chair.

Waller highlighted that the economy is facing increased risks and emphasized the need for monetary policy to be closer to a neutral level, favoring a more accommodative policy rate. He noted that the risks of inflation rising are limited, with tariffs expected to temporarily increase inflation, which should gradually subside next year. Without the impact of tariffs, inflation is projected to approach the 2% target.

He warned that delaying interest rate cuts could lead to more aggressive measures in the future. A rate cut in July could provide room to maintain rates in subsequent meetings. If core inflation remains controlled and economic growth is sluggish, further rate cuts may be necessary, and action should not be delayed until labor market issues arise.
